title: [Feature] Soil sensor missing fertilizer/EC value (measure_ec capability)
excerpt:
**Version:** v5.11.26
**Driver:** soil_sensor
**Device:** _TZE284_hdml1aav (and similar advanced soil sensors)
**Severity:** Medium  missing sensor capability

## Problem
User reports no fertilizer value displayed. The soil sensor driver currently has no measure_ec (electrical conductivity) capability, which is used by advanced soil sensors to report fertilizer concentration.

## Current DP Mappings
- DP3: soil_moisture
- DP5: temperature
- DP14: battery_state
- DP15: battery_percent
- DP9: temperature_unit (internal)
- DP101-105: humidity, luminance, calibration, etc.

No EC/fertilizer DP is mapped. The device only reports DP3, DP5, DP9, DP14, DP15  no EC DP observed in logs.

## Action Needed
1. Create measure_ec custom capability in .homeycompose/capabilities/`n2. Determine which DP carries EC value (likely DP4 or DP101 depending on model)
3. Ask user for app logs (Settings > Apps > Tuya > View Log) to identify incoming DPs
4. Add EC DP mapping to soil_sensor dpMappings
5. Add measure_ec to sensorCapabilities list

**Diag Log ID:** 29bb591c-366f-4b7c-bd7e-490c2032d740
